notes: backend: native C++ atomic batches with parallel power, critical, and matrix order variants
obstacles: oriented pad geometry, net ownership, physical copper layers, width-aware inflation
connectivity: F.Cu-only SMD anchors require explicit vias before inner-layer routing
policy: incomplete multipin trees roll back; open is preferred to illegal copper
GND uses a rounded native CopperArea polygon plus a pad-connected track/via backbone
KiCad refill and DRC remain authoritative for filled-zone polygons and thermals
